title: Trail work: clearing a section on Sabotin
short: On Saturday morning we cleared part of an overgrown mule track and removed branches.
long:
We met at 8:00, split the tools and, in two groups, fixed the most critical spots.

Please ride the freshly maintained sections with care for the first few days (the surface is softer). Next time we’ll also work on reinforcing the edges and cleaning drainage channels.

title: Trail conditions: Škabrjelka
short: Most of the line is dry and fast; shaded sections still have some leaves and small branches.
long:
Tip: after rain, avoid sliding on the edges and brake as smoothly and in control as possible.

If you spot a fallen tree or major damage, let us know (email/IG) with the location and a photo.

title: Call for help: more hands at trail work days
short: Lately we’ve been too few on work days, while there’s always more to do.
long:
If you can contribute 1–2 hours, it makes a huge difference. We have the tools, the meet-up is always simple, and we adapt the pace to the team.

The goal is well-maintained, safe trails with minimal impact on the environment.

title: Endureta 2026 - support the construction and maintenance of the trail
short: With the membership fee and the purchase of **Endureta**, you contribute to the fact that you will be able to ride on new and maintained trails in the future.
long:
Dear members, the year is around.

By being a member of the **TCS** Society, you **support** the construction and maintenance of paths built by the hands of **TCS members**. Therefore, with the membership fee and the purchase of **Endureta**, you contribute so the fact that you will be able to ride on new and maintained trails in the future.

The annual membership fee for 2026 is €30, for those under 15 years of age it is free. 
Members receive **Endureta 2026** as part of the membership fee.


INFORMATION FOR TRANSFERRING THE MEMBERSHIP FEE:

Društvo TCS
Grčna 51
5000 Nova Gorica

TR: SI56 6100 0003 1105 725
Purpose: Membership fee 2026
Purpose Code: OTHR
Amount: €30.00

New members fill out an application form and submit it to info@tcs.bike. 
Existing members are not required to complete a declaration.

Donations should be made **separately,** with the note ' donation '.

Endureta 2026 can also be purchased for a purpose, without membership in the TCS association, costs €30- it is considered a donation.

You can pick it up at the DJAK store in Nova Gorica.
